title: Talson.dev Portfolio Site
problem: After graduating from SAIT, I spent a few months trying to get a custom portfolio site off the ground. I was hosting a block built portfolio off of framer, but decided I need to try building something that shows off some of my skills.
solution: After watching a video from theprimeagen, I realized that it might be fun to build an ultra optimized website. I started planning what would be my attempt at the 14KB site. Which you are looking at right now. Technically it is not a true 14KB site but it has been designed to stay under the 14KB first packet limit that the TCP slow start algorithm loves.
